data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for materials used tracking, which includes the ability to upload receipt photos. However, the evidence provided does not confirm that this functionality is implemented or validated, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage. Specifically, while the use case mentions uploading receipts, there is no concrete evidence of the API or system behavior that supports this requirement being fulfilled.
gaps: No evidence of the API handling receipt photo uploads for materials used tracking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
